name: ASUS PRIME Z890M-PLUS WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Supports DDR5-8666+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 20Gbps Type-C with DP Alt mode - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7
